'''√d-v-ng''' ('''davanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curdle|curdle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curdle|curdle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √d-v-ng
|-
! Lemma
| davanga
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || davangithi || davangiji || davangishi || davangi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || davanguthuth || davangujuj || davangushush || davang
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || davanguthu || davanguju || davangushu || davangu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || davangufuth || davangufuj || davangufush || davanguf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || davangethe || davangeje || davangeshe || davange
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || davangothoth || davangojoj || davangoshosh || davang
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || davangotho || davangojo || davangosho || davango
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || davangofoth || davangofoj || davangofosh || davangof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || davangïf || davangïf || davangïf || davangïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || davangïfïf || davangïfïf || davangïfïf || davangïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || davangïf || davangïf || davangïf || davangïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || davangïf || davangïf || davangïf || davangïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || davangæthæ || davangæjæ || davangæshæ || davangæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || davangathath || davangajaj || davangashash || davang
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || davangatha || davangaja || davangasha || davanga
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || davangafath || davangafaj || davangafash || davangaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || davangasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || godavangasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokidavangasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || davangnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || godavangnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokidavangnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || davangshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || godavangnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokidavangshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || davangroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || godavangnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokidavangroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || davangmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || godavangnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokidavangmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || davangsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || godavangnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokidavangsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || davangngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || godavangnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokidavangngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || davangyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || godavangnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokidavangyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || davangyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || godavangnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokidavangyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || davangnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || godavangnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokidavangnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || davangnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || godavangnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidavangnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || davangnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || godavangnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokidavangnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || davangshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || godavangnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokidavangshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || davangshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || godavangnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidavangshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || davangshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || godavangnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokidavangshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || davangronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || godavangnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokidavangronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || davangroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || godavangnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokidavangroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || davangromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || godavangnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokidavangromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || davangmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || godavangnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokidavangmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || davangmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || godavangnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokidavangmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || davangmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || godavangnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidavangmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || davang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || dævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hodavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hodævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohodavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohodævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüdavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüdævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïdavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïdævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || ludavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || ludævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luludavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luludævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lidavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lidævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilidavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilidævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kodavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kodævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokodavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokodævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kedavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kedævæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekedavang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekedævæng
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
